Get in Touch

Commission a knife, leather piece or custom order — or just ask a question.

Start the Conversation

Fill out the form and I'll get back to you about your inquiry.

Direct Contact

Reach Out Directly

Prefer email? I'm happy to hear from you.

Email

Indioamoedo@gmail.com

Response Time

I aim to respond within a few days

Helpful to include:

  • Type of piece (knife, sheath, leatherwork, etc.)
  • What it will be used for
  • Size or blade length preference
  • Material preferences
  • Photos or references you like
  • Budget range if you have one
